summary: Completed backend testing of Cloudflare R2 image upload pipeline and admin endpoints. All 21 tests PASSED. R2 migration successful - feed listings respond <3s without base64 images. Fixed 1 bug in /admin/form-config endpoint (500 error due to datetime string handling).

minor.issue: FIXED: 500 error when created_at was stored as string instead of datetime (AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'isoformat')
Cache-Control headers show 'no-store, no-cache' instead of backend's 'max-age=31536000, immutable' - likely Kubernetes ingress override (not a code bug)

critical_code_review_comments: R2 image upload pipeline working correctly - uploads to Cloudflare R2 CDN and returns full_path/thumb_path
Feed/listings endpoints exclude base64 images from multi-listing queries (good performance optimization)
Image serve endpoint correctly returns image/webp Content-Type and binary data
All admin endpoints properly require authentication (401 without auth, 200 with valid token)
Category config returns 14 categories with subcategories as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: R2 image pipeline fully tested and working. All 224 listings migrated from base64 to R2 CDN. Token field name in auth response is 'session_token' (not 'token'). Admin endpoints: /admin/boosts, /admin/sellers, /admin/seller-performance, /admin/safety-tips, /admin/form-config, /admin/category-config all working with auth.

feed_endpoints.GET /api/feed/listings?sort=newest&limit: PASS - <3s response, R2 CDN URLs in thumbUrl
feed_endpoints.GET /api/listings?limit=20: PASS - <3s response, no inline base64 images

listing_detail_endpoints.GET /api/listings/{id}: PASS - returns r2_images array with CDN URLs

admin_endpoints.GET /api/admin/sellers (with auth): PASS - returns sellers list and by_location

fix_applied.issue: AttributeError when config.get('created_at') was already a string
fix_applied.fix: Added hasattr check before calling .isoformat() to handle both datetime objects and strings
